name: Perfimmo.Form.FormField.Common

unions.name: FormFieldInfo
unions.comment:
Add info to your field that you will could use to decorate it after

    type FormFieldInfo decoration =
        -- the field is mandatory
        FieldIsMandatory
        -- Allow to add custom decoration to field.
        | CustomDecorator decoration (SubComparator decoration)

aliases.name: SubComparator
aliases.comment:
a function that allow to compare decorator (cf. `formFieldComparable`) between them.
    Useful to {add, remove} `FormFieldInfo decoration` {to,from} field.

name: Perfimmo.Form.FormField.FormDatalist

unions.name: ValueState
unions.comment:
indique le statut de la saisie :
- ChosenItem ->  j'ai cliqué sur une valeur de la liste déroulante
- InputSearch -> je suis en train de tapé ma recherche pour trouver la bonne valeur

unions.name: FormMultiSelect
unions.comment:
Multiselect DOM backend element
- can search a value
- can select several values

aliases.name: SelectTag
aliases.comment: Give a name to the Multiselect

values.name: getMultiselectModel
values.comment: allow to handle Multiselect things that is not handled by FormMultiSelect

values.name: selectValues
values.comment:
set several values as selected from availables values in the Multiselect

    multiselect = FormMultiSelect.init [("1", "toto"), ("2", "titi")] "myMultiSelect" []
    FormMultiSelect.selectValues [("2", "toto")] multiselect

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment: Allow the unfocus multiselect DOM Element

values.name: update
values.comment:
update Multiselect with specific event (tagged as Msg). Should be use with Multiselect.view.

    multiselect = FormMultiSelect.init [("1", "toto"), ("2", "titi")] "myMultiSelect" []
    (newSelect, cmd, out) = FormMultiSelect.update (Multiselect.RemoveItem ("1", "toto")) multiselect
values.type: Multiselect.Msg -> Perfimmo.Form.FormField.FormMultiSelect.FormMultiSelect decoration -> ( Perfimmo.Form.FormField.FormMultiSelect.FormMultiSelect decoration, Platform.Cmd.Cmd Multiselect.Msg, Maybe.Maybe Multiselect.OutMsg )
